data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the FCast receiver
data_description.port: TCP port the receiver listens on (default 46899)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the receiver. Check the host and make sure the FCast receiver app is running.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the receiver.

send_message.name: Send message
send_message.description: Renders a styled announcement card and shows it on the receiver's screen.

title.name: Title
title.description: Small heading shown above the message.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Seconds to show the message before clearing it (0 keeps it until stopped).

background.name: Background color
background.description: Hex color for the card background.

text_color.name: Text color
text_color.description: Hex color for the message text.

accent.name: Accent color
accent.description: Hex color for the title bar accent.

mascot.name: Mascot
mascot.description: Adds a small waving cat to the card.

cast_camera.name: Cast camera
cast_camera.description: Shows a camera on the receiver, as a still snapshot or a live stream.

stream.name: Live stream
stream.description: Cast a continuous live HLS stream instead of a single snapshot.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Seconds to show the camera before clearing it (0 keeps it until stopped).

cast_url.name: Cast URL
cast_url.description: Casts any media URL the receiver can fetch directly.

url.name: URL
url.description: The media URL to play (video, audio, image, HLS/DASH stream).

container.name: Container
container.description: MIME type of the media. Leave blank to guess from the URL.

title.name: Title
title.description: Title to show on the receiver.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Seconds before automatically stopping (0 plays to the end).

cast_playlist.name: Cast playlist
cast_playlist.description: Casts a list of media items; the receiver advances through them itself.

items.name: Items
items.description: List of URLs, or mappings with url/container/title/position.

start_index.name: Start index
start_index.description: Zero-based index of the item to start on.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Seconds before automatically stopping (0 plays to the end).

cast_map.name: Cast live map
cast_map.description: Shows a live map of one or more entities' locations, refreshing on an interval.

track.name: Track entities
track.description: Person, device tracker, or zone entities to plot. The map centers on the first.

refresh_interval.name: Refresh interval
refresh_interval.description: Seconds between map refreshes (0 renders once).

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Seconds to keep the map up before clearing it (0 keeps it until stopped).

title.name: Title
title.description: Heading shown across the top of the map.
